fiber.definition: Fiber-to-the-home carries service over optical fiber to the residence.
cautions: actual performance depends on plan, network design, Wi-Fi, and equipment

cable.definition: Cable broadband commonly uses hybrid fiber-coaxial networks.
cautions: upload performance and architecture vary by market

fixed_wireless.definition: Fixed wireless delivers home internet over a radio connection.
cautions: capacity and signal vary by location

satellite.definition: Satellite internet reaches locations through satellite links.
cautions: latency, data policies, weather, and equipment differ

wifi.definition: Wi-Fi is the in-home wireless network, not the internet service itself.

speed_guidance.principle: Recommend based on concurrent use, upload needs, latency sensitivity, and Wi-Fi—not household size alone.
